creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Maintainer update of mail/coolmail:

	- Fix the "-vol" option for the system beep.

	- Delete non-FreeBSD feature from the man-page.
	
	- Bump PORTREVISION and re-organize the patch-files.

Committer: Deleted file (cvs rm): files/patch-aa
	   Added files (cvs add): files/patch-Makefile files/patch-coolmail.c files/patch-coolmail.man files/patch-display_list.c
